'''Nantama''' was a wealthy resort [[Planet/Legends|world]], controlled by [[House Elegin/Legends|House Elegin]], renowned for the natural beauty of its fields. The [[Third Nantama Synod]] was held there.

Nantama was famous for its exploding novas, the "shooting stars of Nantama." The planet was a popular galactic tourist attraction, even for those luxury-travelers wishing to opt for a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] simulation experience—a sim-vacation, or [[Sim-vacation|sim-voyage]].<ref name="Jedi Quest: The False Peace">''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]''</ref>

The (Human) people of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex]] and [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex]] sectors took pride in the fact that on Nantama only non-Humans performed any labor.<ref name="TEA" />
